Thanks for contributing to ZibStack.NET!
Keep PRs focused on one change. See CONTRIBUTING.md for build/test instructions.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Affected package(s)

<!-- e.g. ZibStack.NET.Dto, ZibStack.NET.Aop, docs, build -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Generator / generated-code behavior change
- [ ] Analyzer / diagnostic change
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Build / tooling

## How was this verified?

<!-- Which test project did you run? New tests added? Sample app exercised? -->

```
dotnet test packages/ZibStack.NET.<Name>/tests/.../<Name>.Tests.csproj -c Release
```

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched from `master`, focused on a single change
- [ ] Tests added or updated (generator behavior asserted where applicable)
- [ ] Docs updated under `docs/src/content/docs/` (and `README.md` for new packages/features)
- [ ] Build is clean — no new warnings
- [ ] Commit subjects use the `[Package]: …` prefix
